meaning: adj.富有洞察力的,有深刻见解的
examples: It's no surprise that Jennifer Senior's insightful.
This painting shows how insightful Cecilia Beaux was as a portrait artist.
These practical, insightful designers have determined the course of late twentieth century fashion.
It was charming, occasionally insightful, and tinged with the melancholy of a long day s sunset.
The First Amendment was an insightful compromise between church and state, federal and local authorities.
